mode: agent

You tested every flow? Everything is working? The app does what you can read in the prompt and milestones markdown files? Any other improvents and features? Think about the user experience, the performance, the code quality, the tests, the documentation, the deployment. You checked that every page is styled and elements styled and aligned correctly, every classname is applied corerectly, it respects a modern nice animated design, with cool transitions. If everything is done, then finish the project. If not, I challange you to think about the next steps and continue working on it, by identifying any remaining issues, prioritizing them, and creating a plan to address them. I want you to be thorough and ensure that the project is truly complete and ready for production use and give 110% effort to finish it. If you are not sure, then ask me for more information or clarification. I want you to be confident in your assessment and provide a clear and concise summary of the project's status, including any remaining tasks or issues that need to be addressed before it can be considered complete. If you are ready to finish the project, then provide a final report that includes all the relevant details and confirms that everything is working as expected.
